compressed_prompt: Compose two angry limericks on moms' struggle to get kids to do chores. Use no commas. Separate with six asterisks (******).
response:
There once was a mom full of rage
Whose kids turned her home to a cage
They left messes galore
And ignored her encore
Now she yells from her soapbox on stage

******

A mother once screamed in despair
At the clothes piled up everywhere
The dishes were grimy
The kids acted slimy
And no one would lend her a prayer
